overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Viking settlement in Assassin's Creed Valhalla. The player character explores a riverside dock with a decorated longship, walks through a market area, examines a large wooden totem statue, and enters a thatched longhouse. The scene features traditional Norse architecture with intricate wood carvings under a partly cloudy afternoon sky.

events.description: approaching a villager sweeping near vegetable stalls
a dog appears and rolls playfully on the ground

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden dock past the decorated longship, moving toward the market area

notable_agents.action: hooded villager sweeping the ground with a broom near the produce stalls
dog lying on its back and rolling playfully on the dirt

entered.detail: large red wooden longship with decorative zigzag patterns moored at the dock
weathered wooden pier surface with scattered purple flowers
wooden table displaying baskets of vegetables and produce
large building with straw roof and wooden walls
tall pointed stone tower visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wooden dock beside a decorated Viking longship. The camera moves forward along weathered planks scattered with flowers, passing a lit torch and approaching a market stall with vegetable baskets. A hooded villager sweeps near the stall while a dog rolls playfully on the ground. In the background, a thatched longhouse and distant stone tower are visible under a partly cloudy sky.

events.description: moving from the dock area into the main settlement grounds
camera tilts upward to examine the wooden totem statue

agents.ego_description: walking around the exterior of the longhouse and approaching a tall carved wooden monument

notable_agents.action: villager sitting at a wooden table outside the longhouse

entered.detail: tall wooden pillar carved with intricate face patterns and decorated with hanging pink flowers
rough timber structure built around the base of the totem

segments.scene_description: Leaving the dock behind, the scene transitions to the settlement interior with dirt ground. The camera moves closer to the thatched longhouse and circles around to reveal a large carved wooden totem with floral decorations. The camera tilts up to examine the intricate carvings on the totem against the blue sky, while a villager sits at a table nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sky view transitioning to longhouse approach

events.description: camera tilts up to focus on the clouds and sky
camera tilts back down to ground level
approaching the carved entrance of the longhouse

agents.ego_description: tilting the camera to observe the sky, then returning to ground level and walking toward the longhouse entrance

notable_agents.action: villager in dark robes walking toward the longhouse entrance
dog walking across the settlement grounds toward the longhouse

entered.detail: white cumulus clouds scattered across blue sky
large carved wooden doorway with ornate pillar decorations and heavy doors

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to focus on the scattered clouds against the bright blue sky, then tilts back down to the settlement grounds. The player approaches the imposing carved entrance of the longhouse, passing a dog and a villager in dark robes who is also heading toward the doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior of Viking longhouse great hall

events.description: entering the longhouse from the outdoor settlement
dramatic shift from bright daylight to dim fire-lit interior

agents.ego_description: moving through the dimly lit longhouse interior, examining the wooden architecture and furnishings

notable_agents.action: villager sitting at a wooden dining table inside the hall

entered.detail: thick timber columns and rafters supporting the roof structure
colorful red and white cloth flags suspended from the ceiling beams
long rough-hewn tables with attached benches arranged in the hall
burning fire in a stone container providing warm orange light
wooden barrels stacked against the woven wall panels

segments.scene_description: The player enters the longhouse through the carved doorway, transitioning from bright daylight to a dimly lit interior illuminated by fire pits. The space features massive wooden support beams, colorful hanging banners, and long dining tables. A villager sits at one of the tables as the camera moves deeper into the hall, passing storage barrels and woven wall panels.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling riverside dock into the dimly lit interior of a traditional Norse longhouse. It begins by gliding along weathered wooden planks beside a decorated longship, passing a lit torch and a market stall where a villager sweeps and a dog plays. As the camera leaves the dock and moves onto the dirt ground of the settlement, the view circles around to tilt upward, examining the intricate carvings of a large wooden totem against a bright, partly cloudy sky. The scene then shifts back down toward the settlement grounds, following a robed villager toward the imposing carved entrance of the longhouse. Finally, the camera crosses the threshold, transitioning from the bright daylight into a shadowed hall illuminated by fire pits, passing massive support beams and colorful banners as it moves deeper into the interior.
